title: Optical Flow, Frame by Frame
tagline: Watch real Lucas-Kanade and dense flow compute live on a sports clip
summary: Play a real video frame-by-frame and watch a real Lucas-Kanade solver compute the 2-D velocity of every pixel, then colour the result as an HSV heatmap. Upload your own clip, step through frames, and feel the brightness constancy assumption break on fast-moving sports action.
highlights: A live video player with frame-by-frame step controls; pick a sports clip or upload your own.
Real per-block Lucas-Kanade runs in pure JS on the current pair of frames — arrows drawn where corners are strong.
Dense flow on a 80×60 grid rendered as an HSV heatmap: hue = direction, value = magnitude.
Slide a magnitude threshold to filter out noise and watch motion pop out of clutter.
